volumes.title: Vol. I: Electric Youth (1978–1983)
volumes.description: Yellow Magic Orchestra and the birth of electronic pop. Thousand Knives to Merry Christmas Mr. Lawrence.

volumes.title: Vol. II: The World in a Wire (1984–1989)
volumes.description: Left Handed Dream through Beauty. Seven solo albums in six years, each a different continent.

volumes.title: Vol. III: Bibo no Aozora (1991–1998)
volumes.description: The pop-to-piano transition. Discord, BTTB, and the first instrumental number one in Japan.

volumes.title: Vol. IV: A Thousand Screens (1987–2023)
volumes.description: Film scores. The Last Emperor to Monster — forty years of cinema as compositional canvas.

volumes.title: Vol. V: Noise and Silence (2002–2009)
volumes.description: Alva Noto, Fennesz, Morelenbaum. The experimental decade — glitch, ambient, Arctic field recordings.

volumes.title: Vol. VI: Ars Longa, Vita Brevis (2017–2023)
volumes.description: async and 12. The final works, composed in the awareness of death.

volumes.title: Appendix: The Conversations
volumes.description: Sylvian, Alva Noto, Fennesz, Morelenbaum. The collaborative life as artistic practice.
